content:
What Are Tech Salaries in Malta?

Malta's tech scene has grown rapidly over the past few years, driven by iGaming, fintech, and a wave of remote-first companies setting up shop on the island. But for developers considering a move — or locals planning their next career step — one question always comes up: what does it actually pay?

Here's what we're seeing on Impjieg, Malta's hiring marketplace for tech and digital talent, where every listing includes salary range, work-mode badge, and company profile.

The Range by Role (2026)

Role
Junior (0-2 yrs)
Mid (3-5 yrs)
Senior (6+ yrs)

Frontend Engineer
€25k-€35k
€35k-€55k
€55k-€75k+

Backend Engineer
€28k-€38k
€40k-€60k
€60k-€85k+

Full-Stack Engineer
€28k-€40k
€40k-€65k
€60k-€90k+

€30k-€42k
€45k-€65k
€65k-€95k+

Data Engineer
€30k-€40k
€45k-€60k
€60k-€85k+

Product Manager
€30k-€45k
€45k-€65k
€65k-€90k+

iGaming Specialist
€32k-€45k
€45k-€70k
€70k-€100k+

All figures in EUR, based on published Impjieg listings.

What Impacts Salary in Malta

Industry matters most. iGaming and fintech consistently pay 15-30% above other sectors. A senior backend engineer at an iGaming operator can expect €70k-€85k, while the same role in a traditional services company might cap at €60k.

Work mode is becoming a differentiator. Fully remote roles from international employers often pay at the higher end of the range — sometimes above market — while hybrid or on-site roles at local companies tend toward the middle.

Experience with specific tech stacks also commands a premium. Go, Rust, Elixir, and modern frontend frameworks (React with Next.js, or Vue) are in highest demand.

Why Salary Transparency Matters

Every job on Impjieg shows the salary range upfront. No "competitive" or "negotiable" — just a clear number. This helps:

•
Candidates filter for roles that match their expectations before applying

•
Employers attract more qualified applicants by being upfront

•
The market become more efficient with better information flow

Malta's tech talent pool is still relatively small — about 15,000-20,000 professionals across the sector. Transparency helps everyone make better decisions faster.

What's Next

If you're a developer thinking about Malta, or already here and planning your next move, browse current listings at impjieg.work — every role shows salary, work mode, and a full company profile.

And if you're hiring, post a job for free and join the growing list of employers who believe in pay transparency.

Impjieg is Malta's hiring marketplace. We help tech, digital, and iGaming talent find roles with transparent salaries and honest work-mode information.
